steps.title: Find the intensity difference
steps.content: The notes rate konbu’s umami as moderate and arame’s as high, showing arame has a stronger umami flavor.

steps.title: Pick the choice that reflects that contrast
steps.content: Choice A notes that both are brown seaweed but points out that arame’s umami is more intense, matching the notes. The other choices either describe a similarity, bring in unrelated foods, or merely state both are seaweeds without any contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
